
Mortality {data-navmenu="Population"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Fishing Mortality by Fleet

```{r fm_trend}
fm <- mv$fishing_mortality
fc <- mv_fleet_colours(fleet_names = fleets)
has_fm_stock <- !is.null(fm) && "stock" %in% names(fm) &&
                length(unique(fm$stock)) > 1L

if (has_fm_stock) {
  fm_stocks <- unique(fm$stock)
  fm_pans <- lapply(seq_along(fm_stocks), function(si) {
    stk    <- fm_stocks[si]
    sub    <- fm[fm$stock == stk, , drop=FALSE]
    fl_grp <- unique(sub$fleet)
    p      <- plot_ly()
    for (fl in fl_grp) {
      fl_sub <- sub[sub$fleet == fl, , drop=FALSE]
      fl_sub <- fl_sub[order(fl_sub$year), , drop=FALSE]
      p <- add_lines(p=p, x=fl_sub$year, y=fl_sub$est,
        name=fl, line=list(color=fc[fl], width=2),
        legendgroup=fl, showlegend=(si == 1L),
        hovertemplate=paste0(fl, " %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"))
    }
    lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
    lay$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label=stk))
    lay$yaxis$title <- "F"
    do.call(layout, c(list(p=p), lay))
  })
  p_out <- do.call(subplot, c(fm_pans, list(
    nrows=1L, shareX=TRUE, shareY=FALSE,
    titleX=FALSE, titleY=TRUE, margin=0.04
  )))
  p_out <- layout(p=p_out, xaxis=list(title="Year"), showlegend=TRUE)
  modelVis::mv_config(p=p_out)
} else {
  mv_plot_trend_multi(
    df      = fm,
    group   = "fleet",
    ylab    = "Fishing mortality (F)",
    title   = "Fishing Mortality by Fleet",
    colours = fc
  )
}
```

### Natural Mortality

```{r nm_display, eval=!is.null(mv$m_adult_ts)}
mts      <- mv$m_adult_ts
ser      <- mts$series
Mbar     <- mts$Mbar
M0_p     <- mts$M0_p
has_ci   <- "lwr" %in% names(ser) && any(!is.na(ser$lwr))
nm_areas <- if ("area" %in% names(ser) && length(unique(ser$area)) > 1L)
              unique(ser$area) else NULL
col_line <- "#e07070"
col_fill <- "rgba(224,112,112,0.3)"

.nm_panel <- function(ar, ai, show_leg) {
  sub <- if (!is.null(ar)) ser[ser$area == ar, , drop = FALSE] else ser
  sub <- sub[order(sub$year), , drop = FALSE]
  p   <- plot_ly()

  # MCMC CI ribbon
  if (has_ci)
    p <- add_ribbons(p = p, x = sub$year, ymin = sub$lwr, ymax = sub$upr,
      fillcolor = col_fill,
      line = list(width = 0.5, color = col_fill),
      showlegend = show_leg, name = "95% CI",
      hovertemplate = "95% CI %{x}: %{y:.4f}<extra></extra>")

  # Mean/median line
  p <- add_lines(p = p, x = sub$year, y = sub$est,
    line = list(color = col_line, width = 2.5),
    name = "Age-2+ M", showlegend = show_leg,
    hovertemplate = "Age-2+ M %{x}: %{y:.4f}<extra></extra>")

  # Mbar reference (mean M over time series) — as a trace so it appears in legend
  if (!is.null(Mbar) && !is.na(Mbar))
    p <- add_lines(p = p,
      x = c(min(sub$year), max(sub$year)), y = c(Mbar, Mbar),
      line = list(color = "grey50", width = 2, dash = "dash"),
      name = "Mbar", showlegend = show_leg,
      hovertemplate = paste0("Mbar: ", round(Mbar, 4), "<extra>Mbar</extra>"))

  # M0 reference (base M for this area) — as a trace so it appears in legend
  M0 <- if (!is.null(M0_p)) M0_p[min(ai, length(M0_p))] else NULL
  if (!is.null(M0) && !is.na(M0))
    p <- add_lines(p = p,
      x = c(min(sub$year), max(sub$year)), y = c(M0, M0),
      line = list(color = col_line, width = 2, dash = "dot"),
      name = "M0", showlegend = show_leg,
      hovertemplate = paste0("M0: ", round(M0, 4), "<extra>M0</extra>"))

  anns <- if (!is.null(ar)) list(mv_top_label(label = ar)) else list()

  lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay$xaxis$title  <- "Year"
  lay$yaxis$title  <- "Natural mortality (/yr)"
  lay$annotations  <- anns
  lay$showlegend   <- show_leg
  do.call(layout, c(list(p = p), lay))
}

if (!is.null(nm_areas)) {
  pans  <- lapply(seq_along(nm_areas),
                  function(i) .nm_panel(nm_areas[i], i, i == 1L))
  p_out <- do.call(subplot, c(pans, list(
    nrows = 1L, shareX = TRUE, shareY = TRUE,
    titleX = FALSE, titleY = TRUE, margin = 0.04)))
  p_out <- layout(p = p_out, xaxis = list(title = "Year"),
                  title = "Natural Mortality (Age-2+)", showlegend = TRUE)
} else {
  p_out <- .nm_panel(NULL, 1L, TRUE)
  p_out <- layout(p = p_out, title = "Natural Mortality (Age-2+)")
}
modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
```

### Density-Dependent M

```{r ddm_scatter, eval=isTRUE(meta$is_ddm) && !is.null(mv$ddm_data)}
dd        <- mv$ddm_data
obs       <- dd$obs
crv       <- dd$curve
crv_ci    <- dd$curve_ci
prms      <- dd$params
areas_ddm <- if (!is.null(prms)) unique(prms$area) else unique(obs$area)

col_curve <- "salmon"
col_fill  <- "rgba(250,128,114,0.35)"

.ddm_panel <- function(ar, ai, show_leg) {
  sub_obs  <- obs[obs$area == ar, , drop = FALSE]
  sub_obs  <- sub_obs[order(sub_obs$year), , drop = FALSE]
  sub_crv  <- if (!is.null(crv)) crv[crv$area == ar, , drop = FALSE] else NULL
  sub_ci   <- if (!is.null(crv_ci)) crv_ci[crv_ci$area == ar, , drop = FALSE] else NULL
  prm      <- if (!is.null(prms)) prms[prms$area == ar, , drop = FALSE] else NULL

  p <- plot_ly()

  # CI ribbon around fitted curve
  if (!is.null(sub_ci) && nrow(sub_ci) > 0)
    p <- add_ribbons(p = p, x = sub_ci$depletion,
      ymin = sub_ci$lwr, ymax = sub_ci$upr,
      fillcolor = col_fill, line = list(width = 0),
      showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "skip")

  # Fitted DDM curve
  if (!is.null(sub_crv) && nrow(sub_crv) > 0)
    p <- add_lines(p = p, x = sub_crv$depletion, y = sub_crv$M_fit,
      line = list(color = col_curve, width = 2),
      name = "Expected depM curve", showlegend = show_leg,
      hovertemplate = "Depletion: %{x:.3f}<br>M̂: %{y:.4f}<extra>Fitted</extra>")

  # Year-gradient colored markers + optional CI segments
  nYr     <- nrow(sub_obs)
  yr_rng  <- range(sub_obs$year, na.rm = TRUE)
  yr_norm <- (sub_obs$year - yr_rng[1]) / max(yr_rng[2] - yr_rng[1], 1)
  # Red (#d62728) → blue (#1f77b4) gradient
  r_val <- round(214 + (31  - 214) * yr_norm)
  g_val <- round(39  + (119 - 39)  * yr_norm)
  b_val <- round(40  + (180 - 40)  * yr_norm)
  pt_cols <- paste0("rgb(", r_val, ",", g_val, ",", b_val, ")")

  # Error bars if CI available
  has_pt_ci <- "lwr" %in% names(sub_obs) && any(!is.na(sub_obs$lwr))
  if (has_pt_ci) {
    for (i in seq_len(nYr)) {
      p <- add_segments(p = p,
        x = sub_obs$depletion[i], xend = sub_obs$depletion[i],
        y = sub_obs$lwr[i],       yend = sub_obs$upr[i],
        line = list(color = pt_cols[i], width = 1),
        showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "skip")
    }
  }

  # Scatter points coloured by year, labelled "Estimated annual M" in legend
  p <- add_markers(p = p,
    x = sub_obs$depletion, y = sub_obs$M_obs,
    marker = list(color = pt_cols, size = 7,
                  line = list(color = "rgba(0,0,0,0.5)", width = 0.8)),
    text = paste0(sub_obs$year, "<br>D: ", round(sub_obs$depletion, 3),
                  "<br>M: ", round(sub_obs$M_obs, 4)),
    hovertemplate = "%{text}<extra></extra>",
    name = "Estimated annual M", showlegend = show_leg)

  # Dashed reference lines (M0 horizontal, D=1 vertical)
  M0_val <- if (!is.null(prm) && nrow(prm) > 0) prm$M0[1] else NULL
  shapes <- list()
  if (!is.null(M0_val) && !is.na(M0_val)) {
    x_max <- max(c(sub_obs$depletion, 1.05), na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05
    shapes <- list(
      list(type = "line", x0 = 0,   x1 = 1,     y0 = M0_val, y1 = M0_val,
           line = list(color = "grey40", width = 1.2, dash = "dash")),
      list(type = "line", x0 = 1,   x1 = 1,     y0 = 0,      y1 = M0_val,
           line = list(color = "grey40", width = 1.2, dash = "dash"))
    )
  }

  # Year range colour indicators (first and last year as coloured markers in legend)
  yr1_col <- paste0("rgb(214,39,40)")
  yr2_col <- paste0("rgb(31,119,180)")
  p <- add_markers(p = p, x = NA_real_, y = NA_real_,
    marker = list(color = yr1_col, size = 8, symbol = "circle",
                  line = list(color = yr1_col, width = 0)),
    name = as.character(yr_rng[1]), showlegend = show_leg)
  p <- add_markers(p = p, x = NA_real_, y = NA_real_,
    marker = list(color = yr2_col, size = 8, symbol = "circle",
                  line = list(color = yr2_col, width = 0)),
    name = as.character(yr_rng[2]), showlegend = show_leg)

  # Parameter annotation (M_b, m1, SD) in top-right
  param_anns <- list()
  if (!is.null(prm) && nrow(prm) > 0) {
    ann_txt <- paste0(
      "M<sub>b</sub> = ", round(prm$M_b[1], 2), "<br>",
      "m1 = ",            round(prm$m1[1],  2), "<br>",
      "SD = ",            round(prm$sd[1],  3))
    param_anns <- list(list(
      x = 0.97, y = 0.97, xref = "paper", yref = "paper",
      text = ann_txt, showarrow = FALSE,
      xanchor = "right", yanchor = "top",
      align = "right",
      font = list(size = 12),
      bgcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)",
      bordercolor = "#cccccc", borderwidth = 1))
  }

  area_ann <- if (length(areas_ddm) > 1L) list(mv_top_label(label = ar)) else list()

  lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay$xaxis$title <- "Age 2+ biomass depletion"
  lay$yaxis$title <- "Age 2+ mortality (/yr)"
  lay$shapes      <- shapes
  lay$annotations <- c(area_ann, param_anns)
  lay$showlegend  <- show_leg
  do.call(layout, c(list(p = p), lay))
}

if (length(areas_ddm) > 1L) {
  pans  <- lapply(seq_along(areas_ddm), function(i) .ddm_panel(areas_ddm[i], i, i == 1L))
  p_out <- do.call(subplot, c(pans, list(
    nrows = 1L, shareX = FALSE, shareY = FALSE,
    titleX = TRUE, titleY = TRUE, margin = 0.06)))
  p_out <- layout(p = p_out, title = "Density-Dependent Natural Mortality",
                  showlegend = TRUE)
} else {
  p_out <- .ddm_panel(areas_ddm[1L], 1L, TRUE)
  p_out <- layout(p = p_out, title = "Density-Dependent Natural Mortality")
}
modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
```
